The following verses give the effects of the line being drawn

Should the owner draw the line with his thumb, fore-finger,
middle finger, or with gold, silver, gem, pearl, curds, fruit, flower
or coloured rice (barley), the result would be quite good. On the
other hand, should he draw the line with a weapon, he would be
killed by a weapon; with a metallic (or iron) piece, he would suffer
imprisonment; with ashes, there would be danger from fire; with
